item.title: Ember & Blade adds console versions, including PS5
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5

Survivors-like adventure game due out in 2026.

Survivors-like adventure game Ember & Blade will launch for consoles, including PlayStation 5, alongside its previously announced PC (Steam) version in 2026, developer LINE Games Corporation announced. Additional consoles will be confirmed within the next few months.

Here is an overview of the game, via LINE Games Corporation:

About

Ember & Blade is a Survivors-like adventure that blends strategic combat, elaborate boss battles, atmospheric visual design, and a dark, intricate storyline.

As a demon hunter bound to temporary immortality through an angel’s pact, you enter the realm where the archdemon Asmodeus has been sealed for centuries and encounter Ariella, the lone guardian of its seal.

Entangled in her tragic fate, you must carve through endless demons and face the question–can destiny itself be defied?

Key features

  • Carve Through Endless Hordes – As the immortal hunter, sweep across battlefields teeming with demons in fast-paced survivors-like action. Every swing scatters foes, every run escalates the chaos, and only your blade stands between order and oblivion.
  • Hellsent Boss Encounters – Face the Judicators of Fate—once mortals who sold their souls to become demons, now wielding immense power and devastating attacks. Only precise timing, careful strategy, and the edge of immortality can carry you to victory.
  • Harness Heavenly Blessings – Angels grant you powers beyond mortal reach. Choose between their heavenly gifts and forge evolving strategies that change with each run. Your path is never the same twice. Immortality does come with certain perks.
  • Defy the Cycle of Death – Each fall is only the start of another run. Resurrection brings deeper secrets and the chance to twist fate itself.
  • Atmospheric Worlds and Dynamic Battles – Step into a realm forged by divine fire and demonic corruption. A visually rich world awaits with balanced design, unique characters, vibrant colors, and vivid effects that bring every battle to life.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer
